headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://images.unsplash.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
